heading: Sky lanterns. No person shall use any sky lantern(s) within the City of Boulder, or anywhere on city-owned property outside of city limits, including Open Space and Mountain Parks land.
verbatim:
(15)	322.4 Battery charging areas: is amended by the addition of the following:
9.	The indoor room or area shall be protected with an automatic fire sprinkler system designed as an ordinary group II hazard and a maximum sprinkler area coverage of 100 square feet.
